rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to search for other users by selecting a filter category.
The system shall allow users to search for other users by selecting a price range as a filter.
The system shall display matching users based on the chosen criteria after the user selects a filter.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to search for other users by selecting a filter category.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: they can start by choosing how they want to filter the results.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows users to search for other users by selecting a price range as a filter.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can either select a category or choose a price range.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After the user selects a filter, the system displays matching users based on the chosen criteria.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the selection is made, the system shows the matching users based on that choice
